edgeCases: Tier normalization whitespace: ' fast ' normalizes to 'fast'
Empty [orchestration.models] table is valid — same as absent
Unknown role key rejected with error naming the key
Invalid tier after normalization (' Genius ') is rejected
Missing tier-to-model mapping returns tier name + ok=false without panic
RunnerUnknown returns tier name as fallback, ok=false
Out-of-band roles (gatekeeper, production-readiness, edge-case-tester, merge-steward) are not annotated in the directive
Allow-list parity: all AllowedTiers() values accepted by config.Load(); all AllowedRoleSlugs() values accepted as keys
ModelReference deduplication: duplicate input tiers produce a single entry
ModelReference stable order: reasoning before balanced before fast regardless of input order
